generated_pair.question: What restriction on f-strings was lifted in Python 3.12?
generated_pair.answer: F-strings can now reuse the same quotes as the enclosing f-string, support multi-line expressions, comments, backslashes, and unicode escape sequences.
supporting_sentences: PEP 701 lifts some restrictions on the usage of f-strings.

Expression components inside f-strings can now be any valid Python expression, including strings reusing the same quote as the containing f-string, multi-line expressions, comments, backslashes, and unicode escape sequences.
